use_cases: Decorative section divider with cursor-reactive wave animation on landing pages
Interactive visual accent for hero sections that responds to mouse movement
Fluid divider element between page sections with smooth enter/exit animations
Subtle interactive element for websites seeking micro-interactions without heavy UI
ai_summary: A minimalist SVG wave path component that creates an interactive, fluid line divider. The wave morphs dynamically as the user moves their mouse across the element, with a smooth spring-like animation on mouse leave. Perfect for adding subtle, engaging motion to landing pages, section dividers, or hero elements without overwhelming the design.
